verdict.answer_first: B gets to the code block immediately after its one-sentence answer 'Use the promise-based API...'; A prefaces its code with a heading '## Option 1: `fs/promises` (preferred, Node 14+)'
verdict.decisiveness: B presents the best solution and then frames the alternative as a conditional for other situations: 'If you're stuck with a callback-style function...'; A presents two co-equal 'Option' sections.
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable because it presents the correct code with less preamble. A developer can copy the code and move on faster.
